title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma et al. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same capabilities as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI; runs entirely in browser via official JS client.

title: chainlit/chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit cookbook showing how to build a chat app backed by Ollama with conversation UI & data persistence.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama4j
summary: Community-maintained Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and Android examples.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on that installs Ollama server on HassOS for private voice/chat automations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets users chat with any local Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Pure Nim client for Ollama API with async support and native binaries.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but fully-featured Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST API with Tokio async runtime.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with dependency injection helpers and Blazor sample chat app.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on Windows/macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models privately within your workspace.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop and other MCP consumers.
